notes:
Mavin Ops is now an Android app with in-app updates.

• Phone-first navigation: bottom bar is Dashboard · Refinery · Payouts · Market · More, with a floating "New order" / "New split" button.
• In-app updates: the app checks here on launch and offers one-tap update when a newer build is posted.
• Plus the recent refinery work: SCU/cSCU quantity toggle, richer Station & Sell-at pickers, and saved crew lineups ("Past crews").
